ab: So’o kayzaeh ay, So’o ’am bae:iw ka kano?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: So’o kayzaeh ay, So’o ’am bae:iw ka kano?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: ya:o ’am bae:iw ka talobong, nimon hayza ay kabae:iwen?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?
B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: moyo hayza ay titibae:iw ka pinlong?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?
B: No, we don't sell betel nut.
A: I want to buy rice.
B: How many packs do you want to buy?
A: Give me three packs.
A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.
B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: yako ’am bae:iw roSa’ noka binbiniSitan tinaebo’ ka ’abora’.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.
B: We only have one bottle left.
A: Go buy me eggs.
B: How many pounds do you want to buy?
A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy two catties.
A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: hini minayngaso’ to:o’ ila nanaw ka binotoe’, ’iniSo’ ila hahi:il.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!
A: How much is this bag of rice?
B: $200 for a pack.

ab: saboeh Sepe:en Sam’iyaeh o ’aehae’ rayhil, be:ay So: Sam’iyaeh rayhil ma’ kayzaeh ila.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.
B: Thank you.
A: Here's $95.

ab: yako ’am bae:iw naehan sowiti’, pak potngor ’aehae’ kaboehoel rayhil.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: saboeh haseb kaboehoel o lampez rayhil.
en: A:All $510.

ab: Sepe: ’iniman haseb kaboehoel rayhil kayzaeh ay?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: hini wa’isan a tomal, kayzaeh ay waelae’ sowiti’?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.
A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: hini walo’ mato:ol rayhil, ’am bae:iw naehan ay ka ’aroma’ kakrangi’an?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
